query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `marketing_requests` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `agentId` int,
  `title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `requestType` enum('graphic','image','slideshow','video','flyer','social_post','other') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'graphic',
  `status` enum('new','in_progress','completed','cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'new',
  `priority` enum('low','normal','high','urgent') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'normal',
  `dueDate` timestamp NULL,
  `responseNote` text,
  `responseFileUrl` text,
  `responseFileKey` varchar(512),
  `responseFileName` varchar(255),
  `respondedById` int,
  `completedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `marketing_requests_agentId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`agentId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  CONSTRAINT `marketing_requests_respondedById_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`respondedById`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `marketing_request_attachments` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `requestId` int NOT NULL,
  `fileUrl` text NOT NULL,
  `fileKey` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
  `fileName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `mimeType` varchar(128),
  `uploadedById` int,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `mra_requestId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`requestId`) REFERENCES `marketing_requests`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `mra_uploadedById_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`uploadedById`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL
);
